name: Managing Users and Permissions in Service Cloud
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Maropost Service Cloud has a dedicated section in the user profile, where you can add users and manage their privileges. Both admins and users (who are granted full access by the admin) can grant/revoke different levels of access to various Service Cloud features for other users."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Although a Service Cloud account has only one admin account, a user can assume roles similar to those of an admin, allowing multiple users to manage the account."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" Service Cloud is available as a standalone product as well as part of the "},{"text":"Unified Platform","bold":true},{"text":" (which includes services from "},{"text":"Marketing Cloud","bold":true},{"text":" and"},{"text":" Service Cloud","bold":true},{"text":" as of now). "}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"So, if you are subscribed to both products, you can manage all users (from both products) and their access/permissions in the same place on the "},{"text":"Users & Permissions","bold":true},{"text":" page, under the user profile dropdown list."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Adding a New User"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To add a new user to the Service Cloud account, follow the steps below:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"1. Log in to your Service Cloud account, then click your user profile drop-down menu and select "},{"text":"Users & Permissions","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L3R6G2HVSRWU/activate0-281-29.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L3R6G2HVSRWU/activate0-281-29.png","name":"activate0(1).png","type":"image/png","size":194893,"width":2880,"height":981,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":851,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:00:55+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"2. The "},{"text":"Users and Permissions","bold":true},{"text":" page opens, displaying a list of all existing users who have been granted access by the admin to manage the platform’s features. To add a new user, click on "},{"text":"Invite","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/WQPVTAAUEKN5/activate1.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/WQPVTAAUEKN5/activate1.png","name":"activate1.png","type":"image/png","size":168335,"width":2880,"height":813,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":850,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:00:55+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"3. On the "},{"text":"Add User","bold":true},{"text":" slider, enter the user's email address and set up their access and permissions. Permissions are categorized into "},{"text":"General","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"Service ","bold":true},{"text":"fields. In the "},{"text":"General ","bold":true},{"text":"section, you can assign either a \""},{"text":"View Only","bold":true},{"text":"\" or \""},{"text":"Full Access","bold":true},{"text":"\" to a user."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/E8S4M3H1AUJH/activate2.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/E8S4M3H1AUJH/activate2.png","name":"activate2.png","type":"image/png","size":333266,"width":2880,"height":1184,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":856,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:02:11+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"4. If you want a user to be a point of contact for communications from Maropost, you can edit the user's permission to set the user as the "},{"text":"Primary Contact","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XLBVWFWJUP6F/activate3.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XLBVWFWJUP6F/activate3.png","name":"activate3.png","type":"image/png","size":323099,"width":2755,"height":1290,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":853,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:01:16+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" A Service Cloud Platform can only have one primary contact per account."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"5. If you have a Marketing Cloud subscription, you'll also see the “"},{"text":"Marketing","bold":true},{"text":"” section, where you can manage Marketing Cloud-specific permissions for the users. To learn more about the various access controls available for Marketing Cloud, see our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/47-managing-users-and-permissions-in-marketing-cloud","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Managing Users and Permissions in Marketing Cloud","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/6Y6Q065MJHSE/activate5.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/6Y6Q065MJHSE/activate5.png","name":"activate5.png","type":"image/png","size":447676,"width":2880,"height":1466,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":854,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:01:33+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"6. In the "},{"text":"Service","bold":true},{"text":" section, you can grant/revoke a user's permission to access the Service Cloud entirely by toggling the Access permission between "},{"text":"ON","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"OFF","bold":true},{"text":". You can also grant either view-only or "},{"text":"full access","bold":true},{"text":" to users who manage the Contacts and Tickets modules in the Service Cloud application. You can also enable the "},{"text":"Support Emails","bold":true},{"text":" option for users who need to manage the incoming customer tickets forwarded to the ticket queue. Save the changes you have made."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/GX8CILAHKYWM/activate4.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/GX8CILAHKYWM/activate4.png","name":"activate4.png","type":"image/png","size":449855,"width":2880,"height":1642,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":855,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:01:53+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Managing Users and Permissions"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the Index page, the user list is displayed as follows:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Email:","bold":true},{"text":" It contains the user's email address."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Access:","bold":true},{"text":" Displays which platform the user has access to."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Role:","bold":true},{"text":" Displays the status of an agent within the operations team. An agent can be an admin, a primary contact, or a user."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Actions:","bold":true},{"text":" This widget allows you to edit, activate/deactivate, duplicate, or delete a user from the list."}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" Admins cannot be deleted from the list."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/9K0EP8U6ALDY/activate6.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/9K0EP8U6ALDY/activate6.png","name":"activate6.png","type":"image/png","size":253190,"width":2880,"height":1005,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F9K0EP8U6ALDY%2Factivate6.png","active":true,"mediaID":1423,"dateInserted":"2025-11-13T07:52:41+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To give administrators better control over access rights for third-party members or employees under contract, you can activate/deactivate user control as per your needs."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/G73VXA52ORBG/activate7.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/G73VXA52ORBG/activate7.png","name":"activate7.png","type":"image/png","size":253859,"width":2880,"height":1005,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FG73VXA52ORBG%2Factivate7.png","active":true,"mediaID":1424,"dateInserted":"2025-11-13T07:52:58+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once deactivated, the employee's access to the application is revoked, and their name is grayed out in the users & permissions list."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To reactivate user access, administrators need to click the "},{"text":"Activate","bold":true},{"text":" option next to the grayed-out user name. Upon user reactivation, administrators must restore all previously assigned permissions."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/RUAYBNBB5NOK/per14.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/RUAYBNBB5NOK/per14.png","name":"per14.png","type":"image/png","size":103664,"width":2880,"height":387,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FRUAYBNBB5NOK%2Fper14.png","active":true,"mediaID":1425,"dateInserted":"2025-11-13T07:53:17+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" Admins cannot be activated/deactivated from the list."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Service Cloud User Privileges"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Contacts"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once a user has been granted contact access ("},{"text":"Full Access","bold":true},{"text":"), they can view, filter, and manage a list of contacts added to the Service Cloud Platform. Agents can also create new contacts. "},{"text":"View Only","bold":true},{"text":" gives limited control to agents while handling the Contacts section."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Tickets"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Full access to this section enables agents to handle and reply to incoming customer tickets. Agents can also create new tickets that can be assigned to other agents."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Support Emails"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"With this privilege, agents can configure and verify support emails. Such support emails are used to route incoming customer emails to the Service Cloud Ticket Queue as tickets."}]}]
